stdout:
## Issue success criteria
- ✅ External toolchain + Lean scaffolding are present (`proofs/lean-toolchain`, `proofs/lakefile.lean`, `scripts/verify-lean.sh`), with explicit Mathlib in `proofs/lakefile.lean:8-10`.
- ✅ End-to-end CI wiring exists: Lean job runs `./scripts/verify-lean.sh` (Charon + Aeneas + Lake) and generated-file drift check (`.github/workflows/ci.yml:156-167`).
- ✅ `gfp` and `gfpn` extraction/translation are evidenced in generated Lean (`proofs/Gf2Core/Types.lean:114,132-160` and many `gfpn.*` defs in `proofs/Gf2Core/Funs.lean`).
- ✅ Const-generic risk gate is addressed and documented (`proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md:55-57`), and `lake build` for the reviewed commit passed (`.jit/gate-runs/4be1917d-b8ea-4c10-b55b-0548f4fee2e2/result.json`).

## No technical debt
- ❌ Documentation debt remains: `CLAUDE.md:62` still says `gfpn/` is blocked, contradicting the current verified status in `proofs/README.md:13-15` and `dev/lean4-verification-pipeline.md:22-25`.
- ❌ `proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md` has an internal contradiction: `gf2_core::gfpn` is listed in the **Opaque modules** table (`line 25`) while also declared “now fully extracted/verified” (`lines 40-46`).

## No test or lint failures
- ✅ Rust CI gate passed on the exact reviewed commit `22135f48...` (`.jit/gate-runs/bb46ddd4-e122-4aab-ab94-e4bb1b45846a/result.json`), running: `cargo check`, `cargo test`, `cargo clippy -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`.
- ✅ Lean build gate also passed on the same commit (`.jit/gate-runs/4be1917d-b8ea-4c10-b55b-0548f4fee2e2/result.json`).

## Separation of concerns
- ✅ Dependency direction is correct: `gf2-core` has no dependency on `gf2-coding` (`crates/gf2-core/Cargo.toml:12-19`), while `gf2-coding` depends on `gf2-core` (`crates/gf2-coding/Cargo.toml:13`).

## Functional paradigm and performance
- ✅ Reviewed changes are infra/docs/proofs/CI-oriented; no new hot-path Rust kernel logic was introduced, and no regressions were found against the functional/performance split.

## Correctness (tail masking, bit numbering, field axioms)
- ✅ No `BitVec` mutator or GF(2) arithmetic implementation changes were introduced in this delta; core invariants are not directly modified.
- ✅ Formal pipeline scope now includes both `gfp` and `gfpn` in generated Lean artifacts.

## Testing
- ✅ Automated evidence exists for lint/test/build on the reviewed commit (cargo-ci + lake-build passed).
- ⚠️ No new Rust feature logic was added here, so TDD/property-test expansion is not directly applicable to this change set.

## Unsafe isolation
- ✅ `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` remains in `gf2-core` (`src/lib.rs:35`) and `gf2-coding` (`src/lib.rs:8`), with unsafe still isolated to SIMD crate design.

## Documentation
- ❌ Documentation consistency requirement is not met due contradictions noted above (`CLAUDE.md:62`, `proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md:25` vs `40-46`).

## Prior review feedback (most recent run)
- ✅ Addressed: inability to certify test/lint/build status is now resolved by fresh passing gate runs on commit `22135f48...`.
- ❌ Unresolved/newly visible quality issue: docs are still internally inconsistent about `gfpn` verification status.

## Jit issue dependencies
- ✅ `issue.dependencies` is empty; no prerequisite work is blocking this issue.

VERDICT: FAIL
---
Gate result: FAILED
